Label: N/A
Issue: Missing section on system's response to erroneous inputs
Correction: The system shall provide detailed error messages and recovery options for all erroneous inputs.

Label: Section 3.2.3
Issue: Does not specify the exact resource requirements
Correction: The system shall require a minimum of 4GB RAM, 2 CPU cores, and 10GB of storage space.

Label: Section 4.1
Issue: Does not specify hardware compatibility details
Correction: The system shall be compatible with x86 and ARM architectures.

Label: Section 5.1
Issue: Does not specify the development tools and software used
Correction: The development environment shall include IntelliJ IDEA, JDK 11, and Maven 3.6.3.

Label: Section 6.1
Correction: Use Case: User requests test results for a specific commit. Preconditions: User is in a git repository. Postconditions: Test results are displayed or saved.

Label: Section 7
Issue: Does not specify all functional requirements
Correction: The system shall allow users to schedule automated test runs at specified intervals.

Label: Section 8
Correction: The system shall execute tests and generate reports within 5 minutes for projects with up to 1000 commits.

Label: Section 9
Issue: Does not specify data retention policy
Correction: The system shall retain test data for a minimum of 1 year and allow users to archive older data.

Label: Section 10
Issue: Does not specify user interface accessibility features
Correction: The user interface shall include options for high contrast mode and screen reader compatibility.

Label: Section 11
Issue: Does not specify test scenarios for edge cases
Correction: Test Scenario: User inputs an invalid commit ID. Expected Result: System displays an error message and prompts for a valid ID.
